历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 11105 → 10250 → 16455 → 15309 → 12271, showing significant fluctuations: a sharp drop to 16455 in 2023 due to a gap, recovery to 15309 in 2024, and further recovery to 12271 in 2025, with a clear upward trend in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 12271. The enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Inner Mongolia was 69 students in 2021–2022 and 71 students in 2023–2025; in 2026, the physics category plan is 54 students and the medical category (physics + chemistry selection) plan is 13 students, totaling 67 students, a reduction of 4 students (-5.6%) compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, with continuously improving comprehensive strength and recognition; the 2025 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving abnormal admission score lines (high attention), with an extreme gap event of 389 points admission in Heilongjiang, which may have a lagging psychological impact on 2026 applications; the 2026 reputation evaluation remains somewhat negative but mainly with neutral events; Douyin popularity ranking is 8th (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 5.85 million, indicating extremely high attention on short video platforms and reflecting undiminished application heat.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of Inner Mongolia examinees increased significantly from about 116,000 in 2025 to about 154,000 in 2026 (+32%), sharply intensifying competition; regarding provincial control lines, the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 375 points and the history category is 418 points; in terms of major popularity, engineering majors such as computer science, artificial intelligence, and automation remain highly popular, while medical majors like clinical medicine maintain high attention; Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, making it a cross-province application for Inner Mongolia examinees; its enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is about 70–80 students, a relatively small proportion, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 12271, a reduction of 4 students (-5.6%) in 2026, a 32% increase in the total number of Inner Mongolia examinees, the continuous rise of the school's Soft Science ranking to 44th, and high Douyin attention, competitive pressure has significantly increased. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will move forward (numerically decrease) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 11656, with a range of 11156–12156.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 1497 → 3028 → 1592 → 2385 → 1257, with significant fluctuations: in 2022, it dropped to 3028 due to a gap, rebounded to 1592 in 2023, fell back to 2385 in 2024, and surged to 1257 in 2025 (best in five years). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1257. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia was 16 students from 2021 to 2022, and 14 students from 2023 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 18 students, an increase of 4 students (+28.6%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science ranking has steadily risen from 53rd in 2021 to 44th in 2026, indicating continuous improvement in comprehensive strength. In 2025, its reputation was slightly negative (abnormally high attention in admissions), and in 2026, it remains slightly negative but mainly with neutral events. Its Douyin popularity ranks 8th overall (high heat), with a comprehensive heat of 5.85 million, extremely high attention, which also boosts applications for liberal arts majors. The fifth round of discipline evaluation did not include any A- or above disciplines for Zhengzhou University. Liberal arts-related disciplines (such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication) were mostly rated B+ in the fourth round, indicating moderate disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia increased from approximately 116,000 in 2025 to about 154,000 in 2026 (+32%), significantly intensifying competition. Popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature remains stable to slightly hot. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou, Henan, which is an inter-provincial application for Inner Mongolia examinees. The liberal arts enrollment scale is small (14–18 students), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1257, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 4 students (+28.6%), a 32% increase in total examinees, and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, the easing effect of expansion and the intensifying effect of increased competition roughly offset each other, with the university's popularity remaining high. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1423, with a range of 1210–1636.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Medicine at Zhengzhou University in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region were 6076, 15567, 11259, 11329, and 12271 respectively, showing a trend of first a significant decline, then a rebound, followed by minor fluctuations. The enrollment plan was 10 in 2021, 17 from 2022 to 2024, reduced to 13 in 2025, and remains unchanged at 13 in 2026. The unchanged plan implies a supply-demand elasticity baseline of 12271, but combined with recent ranking fluctuation trends, there is natural upward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhengzhou University is a key national university under the 211 Project and has been selected as a national Double First-Class university. Although not a 985 university, it enjoys a high reputation among comprehensive universities nationwide, with strong medical disciplines and consistently strong appeal in majors such as Clinical Medicine.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application enthusiasm in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region, with fierce competition in majors such as Clinical Medicine and Medical Laboratory Technology. Zhengzhou University is located in Zhengzhou City, Henan Province, with a superior geographical location, which has a certain appeal to Inner Mongolian candidates. The 2026 enrollment plan for Medicine is the same as in 2025, but the overall popularity of Medicine remains high, and rankings are expected to rise slightly.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Medicine at Zhengzhou University in Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region in 2026 is approximately 12471, slightly higher (harder to enter) than in 2025, with a fluctuation range of 12159 to 12783.
